results.definition_en: A set of parts that work together as a whole.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 系統、體系;作為整體共同運作的一組部分。
results.example_en: The school has a new system for tests.
results.example_zh_tw: 學校採用了新的考試制度。

results.definition_en: Words said between two or more persons.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 談話、交談;兩人或多人間的言語往來。
results.example_en: We had a long talk last night.

results.definition_en: What one notes through the tongue, like sweet or sour.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 味道;舌頭所感的酸甜苦辣。
results.example_en: The soup has a salty taste.

results.definition_en: Money one must pay to the government.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 稅;向政府繳納的金錢。
results.example_en: We pay tax on what we get from work.
results.example_zh_tw: 我們的工作所得要納稅。

results.definition_en: The act or work of giving knowledge to others.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 教學、教導;把知識傳給他人之事。
results.example_en: Teaching is hard but good work.
results.example_zh_tw: 教學雖然辛苦但很有意義。

results.definition_en: A way a thing or person is likely to act.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 趨勢、傾向;事物或人慣有的行事方式。
results.example_en: She has a tendency to be late.

results.definition_en: An act done to see how good or right a thing is.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 測驗、考驗;用以檢驗事物優劣或正誤之舉。
results.example_en: We had a test in school today.

results.definition_en: An idea about how a thing is or why it is so.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 理論、假說;對事物如何或為何的見解。
results.example_en: She has a theory about the lost key.
results.example_zh_tw: 她對遺失的鑰匙有個推論。

results.definition_en: A word used for anything that is not a person or animal.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 東西、事物;指非人或動物的任何之物。
results.example_en: What is that thing on the table?

results.definition_en: What goes on in the mind; an idea.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 思想、念頭;心中的概念或想法。
results.example_en: Give me a moment for my thought.

results.definition_en: The loud noise that comes after lightning in a storm.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 雷、雷聲;暴風雨中閃電後的巨響。
results.example_en: The thunder made the baby cry.

results.definition_en: What goes on from before to now to after, made of minutes and hours.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 時間;由分時組成、自過去到未來的流動。
results.example_en: Do you have time for a drink?

results.definition_en: A soft white-grey metal; or a box made of this metal for food.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 錫;柔軟銀白色金屬，或以此製成的食物罐。
results.example_en: Open this tin of fish.

results.definition_en: The highest part of a thing.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 頂端、最上方;事物最高之處。
results.example_en: She climbed to the top of the tree.

results.definition_en: The act of putting one's hand or body on a thing.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 觸碰、接觸;以手或身體碰觸某物。
results.example_en: Do not touch the wet paint.

results.definition_en: The buying and selling of things.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 貿易、交易;買賣行為。
results.example_en: Trade with the East is growing fast.
results.example_zh_tw: 與東方的貿易迅速擴大。

results.definition_en: The act of taking things or people from one place to another.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 運輸、運送;將人或物自一地送往他地。
results.example_en: Cars are used for transport.
results.example_zh_tw: 汽車是用來運輸的工具。

results.definition_en: A clever or sly act done to take someone in.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 把戲、詭計;巧妙或狡猾的手段。
results.example_en: He played a small trick on his friend.
results.example_zh_tw: 他對朋友開了個小玩笑。

results.definition_en: A thing that makes one's life hard or full of pain.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 麻煩、困擾;使生活困苦或痛苦之事。
results.example_en: She is in great trouble at work.

results.definition_en: An act of changing the way a thing is facing or moving.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 轉、轉向;改變面向或行動方向。
results.example_en: Take a sharp turn to the left.

results.definition_en: An act of turning a thing round so it changes shape.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 扭、扭轉;使物轉動而變形。
results.example_en: Give the lid a hard twist.

results.definition_en: One of a number of equal parts that make up a whole.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 單位、單元;組成整體的等量部分。
results.example_en: A metre is a unit of length.

results.definition_en: The act of putting a thing to work.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 使用、運用;讓事物發揮功能。
results.example_en: Make good use of your time.

results.definition_en: How much a thing is worth.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 價值;事物的所值。
results.example_en: The book is of great value to her.
results.example_zh_tw: 這本書對她而言極有價值。

results.definition_en: Writing in lines with rhythm, like a poem or song.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 詩、韻文;具節奏的分行書寫，如詩或歌。
results.example_en: She wrote a short verse for her friend.
results.example_zh_tw: 她為朋友寫了一首小詩。
